features.featureTitle: Add a live NOC mini-widget to the KD Trust page (frontend/src/pages/KDTrustPage.tsx) that displays real-time system status for Omni-Mesh, AI Self-Healing, Black Hole Mode, and Predictive Failover. Since WebSockets are not supported on the platform, use a polling interval of 5 seconds via React Query or setInterval to fetch NOC status from the existing backend actor. Each status badge must glow and pulse using CSS keyframe animations, with color-coded values: ACTIVE=green, IDLE=gray, INACTIVE=red, READY=yellow, NOT READY=orange. Apply smooth CSS transitions on status changes.
